run_metadata.coverage_summary: Daily incremental discovery run. Tier 1 federal + all state/territory portals surveyed via web search (AusTender, buy.nsw, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA, Tenders SA, Tenders Tasmania, QTOL NT, Tenders ACT). Tier 2 sampled: local government via VendorPanel public tenders, GBE water (Sydney Water, Melbourne Water), CSIRO, and WA Primary Health Alliance (WAPHA). Tier 3 (mandatory) attempted: SAP Ariba / SAP Business Network Discovery, BHP, Rio Tinto, Woodside — no publicly-visible individual corporate RFx could be captured (all buyer detail is registration- or invitation-gated), so corporate channels are recorded in discovered_sources only, not invented as tenders. COVERAGE LIMITATION (unchanged from recent runs): this run executed under a restrictive network egress policy. Direct HTTPS access to primary tender portals was blocked — every portal host (www.tenders.gov.au, tenders.sa.gov.au, tendersonline.nt.gov.au, vendorpanel.com.au, etc.) returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch, confirmed against the agent-proxy status endpoint. Only WebSearch (a separate backend) was usable; no primary tender detail page or tender document could be opened directly. Every opportunity below was surfaced from indexed web-search snippets carrying real detail-page URLs and consistent titles; headline identity fields are corroborated, but closing dates/times, values, deliverables, eligibility, evaluation criteria and contacts were NOT verifiable against the primary notice and must be confirmed on the buyer portal. Every captured tender is consequently flagged as pending a detail pass.
gaps: Direct HTTPS fetch of all primary tender portals blocked (HTTP 403 via proxy/bot-protection); confirmed via curl to $HTTPS_PROXY/__agentproxy/status. All detail extraction was headline-only from WebSearch snippets — no primary notice, document, closing time, value, deliverable or contact could be verified against the source.

Victoria (tenders.vic.gov.au) and Queensland (QTenders) surveyed but no individually-named open tender with a corroborated title/closing date surfaced in search snippets this run; deferred to next run.

Two AusTender opportunities that surfaced (FSANZ-2026/6 food analysis services; ACDC One Health National Conference 2027 event management) had closing dates of 2026-07-13, i.e. already closed by this run date (2026-07-14), so were excluded as stale rather than recorded as open.

Wujal Wujal Aboriginal Shire Council 'Reef Guardian Cemetery Access Road & Car Park' (via VendorPanel) surfaced but closed 2026-07-01 — excluded as closed; VendorPanel public tenders board was checked.
WA WAPHA RFQ994 (Bondi 2025 Response Education & Training Support, Perth North PHN) surfaced but closed 2026-07-09 — excluded as closed; the WAPHA tender page itself is recorded as a new source.
SAP Ariba Discovery: no Australia-specific open posting could be read without an authenticated supplier session; the public board is registration-gated and recorded in discovered_sources.

Tier 3 mining/energy buyers (BHP interestedsupplier portal, Rio Tinto Buy Local, Woodside): individual opportunities are registration- or invitation-gated; portals recorded in discovered_sources, no corporate tenders fabricated.

Aggregator/dashboard sites (govmarket.com.au, tenderhub.com.au, tendersontime.com, australiantenders.com.au, bidio.ai, qld2032.com, tastenders.com) appeared in results and were used only as discovery signals to confirm buyer-originated sources; none are recorded as sources of truth.
recommended_seed_additions: WA Primary Health Alliance (WAPHA) tender page — https://www.wapha.org.au/tender/ — buyer-originated NFP/health commissioning body, publishes RFQs directly.

Rio Tinto Buy Local (onlineprocurement.com.au) EOI portal — https://riotintobuylocal.onlineprocurement.com.au/eois — buyer-originated corporate EOI board on the onlineprocurement.com.au (Felix) platform, distinct from the riotinto.com supplier-portals page already known.

tenders.title: RAAF Base Tindal Renewable Energy Microgrid – Design Services
tenders.buyer: Department of Defence — Defence Support and Reform Group (DSRG)
tenders.description: Design services for a renewable energy microgrid at RAAF Base Tindal, NT, published by Defence DSRG.
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via WebSearch of AusTender current ATM list; previously seen under the same dedup_key, still open/closing-soon this run. Buyer-originated (Defence DSRG on AusTender).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — closing date/time, scope, deliverables, value and contacts not verified against the primary AusTender detail page (portal returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch). Confirm on tenders.gov.au before relying.

tenders.notes: Headline-level only — scope, deliverables, value, delivery location and contacts not verified against the primary AusTender detail page (portal 403 to direct fetch). Confirm on tenders.gov.au.

tenders.description: Kerb installation works as part of Stage 2 pavement rehabilitation on the HW4 (Newell Highway) at Log Creek, published via the NSW / Transport for NSW eTendering system.
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / Transport for NSW eTendering
tenders.delivery_location: Log Creek, New South Wales (Newell Highway / HW4)
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via WebSearch of buy.nsw / Transport for NSW eTendering opportunities. Buyer-originated (Transport for NSW).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — tender_id, exact scope, value and contacts not verified against the primary buy.nsw notice (portal 403 to direct fetch). Deep link not captured; confirm on buy.nsw.

tenders.title: Power and Water Corporation tender (title pending detail)
tenders.description: An open Power and Water Corporation procurement listed on the NT QTOL current-tenders board with a closing date of 23 July 2026.
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via WebSearch of NT QTOL current tenders. Buyer-originated (Power and Water Corporation, an NT government-owned corporation, on QTOL).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — the specific tender title, tender_id, scope, value and contacts were NOT captured; only the buyer and a 23-Jul-2026 closing were visible in search snippets. Portal returned 403 to direct fetch. Confirm the exact listing on tendersonline.nt.gov.au.

tenders.title: Drinking Water Program — EPCM Projects (Expression of Interest)
tenders.description: Expression of interest for EPCM (engineering, procurement and construction management) services supporting Sydney Water's Drinking Water Program of projects.
tenders.submission_method: Via Sydney Water eTendering / supplier portal
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via WebSearch; an aggregator listing (govmarket.com.au) flagged the EOI, then pivoted to Sydney Water's own current-tenders / eTendering source as the recorded source of truth. Buyer-originated (Sydney Water GBE).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — closing date, packages, deliverables, value and contacts NOT verified against Sydney Water's primary notice (portal 403 to direct fetch; aggregator used only as a discovery signal). Confirm on sydneywater.com.au / tenders.nsw.gov.au/sydneywater.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced while searching Tenders WA; WAPHA (the WA Primary Health Networks commissioning body) publishes its own RFQs directly (e.g. RFQ994 Perth North PHN) on its website rather than only on Tenders WA.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated NFP/health commissioning body. Not previously in the known-source list. Individual RFQs are publicly listed; RFQ994 (closed 2026-07-09) confirmed the page carries live opportunities.

discovered_sources.source_name: Rio Tinto Buy Local — Expressions of Interest
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced while searching BHP/Rio Tinto/Woodside supplier opportunities; Rio Tinto runs a 'Buy Local' EOI board on the onlineprocurement.com.au (Felix) platform, distinct from the riotinto.com supplier-portals page already known.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated corporate EOI channel. EOI list is browsable; responding requires registration. Records the portal per the private-sector registration-gated rule — no individual opportunity fabricated. Also flags onlineprocurement.com.au / Felix as a sibling-buyer platform worth pivoting from.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Mandatory Tier 3 check. Public posting board searched; Australia-specific open RFx could not be read without an authenticated supplier session.
discovered_sources.notes: Registration-gated. Recorded so the corporate source set stays complete; no gated opportunity invented as a tender.
